en.description: Experienced and passionate Fullstack Developer with a strong focus on building efficient and scalable web applications. On the frontend, I work with React, JavaScript, and Tailwind CSS to create intuitive, responsive, and visually appealing user interfaces. On the backend, I leverage Express.js and Supabase to build robust, high-performance services and seamless data-driven experiences. I am a detail-oriented and collaborative developer, passionate about delivering clean, maintainable code and impactful digital solutions.
